scripts.preflight:prod: npm run check:sign-ui-syntax && npm run check:prod-guard && npm run lint
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run preflight:prod && netlify deploy --prod --dir . --site 63a3902a-8d74-4914-9d80-2e5cf53a28d8 --message "safe prod deploy"
scripts.prebuild: npm run lint && npm run security-patterns && npm run security-check
